tex:
(a) Jo buys a candle for \$3.20.
\newline

She sells the candle for \$4.64.
\newline

Find the percentage profit on the candle.
\newline

(b) The candle is in the shape of a cone.
\newline

The volume of the candle is $900\,\text{cm}^3$.
\newline

The height of the candle is $8\,\text{cm}$.
\newline

Calculate the radius of the candle.
\newline

content.content:
Jo buys a candle for \$3.20.
\newline

She sells the candle for \$4.64.
\newline

Find the percentage profit on the candle.
\newline

The candle is in the shape of a cone.
\newline

The volume of the candle is $900\,\text{cm}^3$.
\newline

The height of the candle is $8\,\text{cm}$.
\newline

Calculate the radius of the candle.
\newline

_rawBody:
\begin{parts}
\item Jo buys a candle for \$3.20\,.

She sells the candle for \$4.64\,.

\vgap

Find the percentage profit on the candle.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[][\%]
\Marks{2}

\item The candle is in the shape of a cone.

The volume of the candle is 900\,cm$^3$.

The height of the candle is 8\,cm.

\vgap

Calculate the radius of the candle.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[][cm]
\Marks{3}

\end{parts}
